title: Factlet
description: One atomic, source-cited truth about private information. Conforms to Factlet Protocol v0.1 §3.

id.description: Stable identifier, unique within a Factbook. Conventionally f### (e.g. f001). MUST be immutable once published.

statement.description: The factlet text. SHOULD be a single declarative sentence.

confidence.description: Producer's confidence the statement is true.

sources.description: Provenance pointers (file:line, commit hash, URL, document path, incident ID).

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping.

supersedes.description: IDs of older factlets this one replaces. The superseded factlets MUST be marked archived: true.

merged_into.description: If this factlet was merged into another, the target ID.

archived.description: If true, the factlet is no longer authoritative.

retired_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the factlet was archived.

extension.description: Vendor-specific fields. Implementations MUST ignore unknown keys.

profile.description: v0.2 (RFC 0002) — per-factlet profile override. Profile name pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{0,63}$ (no path traversal).

origination.description: v0.2 (RFC 0003) — provenance of the factlet RECORD itself. Distinct from `sources` (provenance of the underlying claim).

source_type.description: Producer type. Recommended values: manual, llm, import, forward-pass, reverse-pass. Profile extensions may add domain-specific values; readers SHOULD warn on unknown values, not reject (RFC 0013).

source_ref.description: Free-form pointer to the production event (commit hash, session ID, importer name+version).

authored_at.description: When the factlet record was created.

rationale.description: RFC 0010 — why the claim holds or why this choice was made. The intent that source artifacts structurally discard. Domain-general; BASE spec.

alternatives.description: RFC 0010 — options considered and rejected at decision time. Distinct from RFC 0004 supersession (a rejected alternative was never adopted and has no factlet of its own). Output shape of normalize_alternatives().

ref.description: Optional factlet id, if the alternative was itself once a recorded factlet (RFC 0004 lineage).

attribution.description: RFC 0011 — splits the agent/process that GENERATED the claim (produced_by, derivation) from the role/owner ACCOUNTABLE for it (authority, sign-off). Domain-general; BASE spec. Output shape of project_attribution().

produced_by.description: The agent or process that generated this claim. Derivation, not accountability.

authority.description: The role or owner accountable for this claim being true. Sign-off, not derivation. MAY be absent for unreviewed candidates.

review_status.description: Review state when it signals explicit sign-off.
